price: Kada se oni za kojim su se drugi povodili odreknu onih koji su ih slijedili i kaznu budu iskusili, i kada im se svi putevi spasa pokidaju,
arabic: إِذۡ تَبَرَّأَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتُّبِعُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُواْ وَرَأَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ وَتَقَطَّعَتۡ بِهِمُ ٱلۡأَسۡبَابُ

version.title: Bosnian Translation - Muhammad Mihanovich
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into Bosnian by Muhammad Mihanovich, printed in 2013. some referred verses corrected by Supervision of Rowwad Translation Center. The original translation is available for suggestions, continuous evaluation, and development.

meta.transliteration: idh tabarra-a alladhīna ittubiʿū mina alladhīna ittabaʿū wara-awū al-ʿadhāba wataqaṭṭaʿat bihimu al-asbābu
